paper_title: PEGASUS: Pre-training with Extracted Gap-sentences for Abstractive Summarization

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces Gap Sentences Generation (GSG) as a self-supervised pre-training objective tailored for abstractive text summarization, where entire sentences are masked and regenerated from the remaining text to simulate summary generation
raw_extraction.application: Text summarization, abstractive summarization of news, scientific articles, emails, patents, legislative bills
raw_extraction.research_problem: Abstractive text summarization lacking effective self-supervised pre-training objectives
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Gap Sentences Generation (GSG), Masked Language Modeling (MLM)
